name: Spirited Artichoke Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, finely chop the drained artichoke hearts until they are chopped but not pureed.
2. Transfer the chopped artichokes to a microwave-safe bowl and stir in the grated cheddar cheese and drained green chili peppers.
3. Heat the mixture in the microwave for 3-5 minutes until heated through.
4. Serve warm with cocktail rye bread.
Yield: 2 1/2 cups
